name: mr-burger-plugins
description: Plugin ecosystem for 10th grade Intensive Reading — instruction, data analysis, classroom operations, and personal productivity

plugins.name: ir-teaching
plugins.description: Complete 10th grade Intensive Reading teaching system — Florida BEST ELA benchmarks, 6-day unit building, lesson planning, ESOL support, assessments, and rubrics

plugins.name: ir-data-pipeline
plugins.description: Student assessment data pipeline — ingest, validate, analyze, group, and report on FAST PM, NWEA, and other assessment data

plugins.name: ir-classroom-ops
plugins.description: Classroom operations — parent contact logs, behavior tracking, observation prep, PD tracking, and substitute folder management

plugins.name: mr-burger-workflow
plugins.description: Personal productivity system — brain dumps, weekly planning, daily briefings, and Second Brain management with Notion integration
